localizations.title: Lost in the Time Warp
localizations.hiddenObject_1: Observe the bottom part of the longcase clock, around A.T.'s signature.
localizations.hiddenObject_2: Something is stuck in the frozen basin.
localizations.code_1: The room shakes, the machine crackles and disappears before your eyes in a blinding flash. It is probably for the best and the butterflies fluttering outside will not say otherwise. Playing with the threads of time is just as thrilling as dangerous, but a too great power entails a too great responsibility!
localizations.hint_1_first: You need exactly 4 doses of fuel to fill up the machine.
localizations.hint_1: In the machine 58, for starters, proceed as follows: 8->3, then 3->5. Repeat the procedure. There will only be 1 dose left in barrel 3.
localizations.hint_9_first: This acorn will become a beautiful oak in a few years. If only you had time.
localizations.hint_9: If you plant this acorn in 1900, the oak will have probably grown by 1950.
localizations.hint_10: This saw can be used for cutting wood and even ice.
localizations.hint_12: You need a sharp tool to pull this gizmo.
localizations.hint_13: If you had a net, you couldn't help but catch it.
localizations.hint_14: Useful for making holes in the ground.
localizations.hint_16: Returning to the present requires that you enter the current year in the app.
localizations.hint_18: One book is missing. Lucky you! As it happens, you do have one.
localizations.hint_19: With the right tool, you could either chop some wood or engrave something on this tree.
localizations.hint_20: To cancel an event, you must substract it from the time-hopper.
localizations.hint_21_first: Obviously, you need exactly 4 doses of fuel to fill up the machine.
localizations.hint_21: In the machine 58, for starters, proceed as follows: 8->3, then 3->5. Repeat the procedure. There will only be 1 dose left in barrel 3.
localizations.hint_22: To retrieve the gizmo; you have to melt the ice.
localizations.hint_23: You are in 1974 and Igor has again started a family. So, his son is?
localizations.hint_26: A pocket knife can come in handy. Not for cutting wood or ice but maybe for a more poetic action.
localizations.hint_28_first: Igor must absolutely win Sophie back. Leave him a message somewhere in the garden to help him.
localizations.hint_28: Why don't you engrave an eternal message on the tree?
localizations.hint_30: Needless to say that these objects will be useful later in this adventure.
localizations.hint_33_first: The safe works with a 5-digit combination, which corresponds to the number of books in the bookcase (by replacing the one you found).
localizations.hint_33: Each book alludes to a number: Seasons = 4, Oblivion = 0, etc.
localizations.hint_35: When time comes, use these matches to start a fire.
localizations.hint_37: If the fireplace happened to disappear, you could retrieve the object that is stuck in it.
localizations.hint_40: One of these melodies will point you to the year you must go to. But still, what you need is a sound signal to guide you.
localizations.hint_45: You must customize this message with initials.
localizations.hint_46: If Igor does not become a father, Alcibiades will never be born. It is imperative that you do something. Investigate the past.
localizations.hint_52: You will have to entrust this book with someone really smart.
localizations.hint_54: This nice lawn is only waiting to be dug into.
localizations.hint_55_first: Once tipped over, note that the sands in these hourglasses do not pour at the same flow rate.
localizations.hint_55: The sequence in which the numbers appear is important.
localizations.hint_58: Once you have found the number of required doses, you will have to transfer the liquid between barrels to reach this dosage.
localizations.hint_64: With this fire, you can melt the ice.
localizations.hint_68: You'll be able to plant something in there later.
localizations.hint_69_first: This melody matches only one of the 3 compositions on the score. Identify it by the number of notes.
localizations.hint_69: The beats marked by the metronome indicate specific notes of the melody.
localizations.hint_70: You shouldn't have caught this butterfly but maybe you'll be able to fix this mistake later.
localizations.hint_71: To progress in the adventure, you must enter the correct years in the machine. The book should help you in finding the first one.
localizations.hint_72: You'll be able to dislodge this item toward the end of the game.
localizations.hint_75_first: Our current time is precisely midway between 1900 and the still to be determined year in the future.
localizations.hint_75: What year are we in? How many years are there between 1900 and now?
localizations.hint_77: Have you seen the box that is stuck in the tree?
localizations.hint_79: Have you take card 1 ? Remember the number of deadly sins but foremost, the year in which this book was published.
localizations.hint_82: Now, all that's left is to find a butterfly to catch.
localizations.hint_86: To understand how this gizmo works, you must first go to the future.
localizations.hint_99_first: The app has a life of its own. Press the blinking button.
localizations.hint_99: To find the right colors, closely look at the professor's living room such it has evolved during the adventure.
localizations.answer_hint_1: To finalize, 5->8, 3->5, 8->3 and there will be exactly 4 doses in barrel 8.
localizations.answer_hint_9: In 1900, make a hole in the ground (68) and plant the acorn (9).
localizations.answer_hint_12: By cutting the ice (12) with the saw (10), you extract the block with the gizmo.
localizations.answer_hint_13: Catch the butterfly (13) with the net (82).
localizations.answer_hint_18: Put the book (79) back in the bookcase (18).
localizations.answer_hint_20: If you had not caught the butterfly, nothing would have happened. Follow the instructions of the user manual to annul the butterfly capture (card 70) with the time-hopper (card 86): 86-70=16.
localizations.answer_hint_21: To finalize, 5->8, 3->5, 8->3 and there will be exactly 4 doses in barrel 8.
localizations.answer_hint_22: It is with the wood fire (64) that you will melt the ice (22).
localizations.answer_hint_23: 1974, the Tempus lineage is restored: Victor is the great-grandfather, Hector the grandfather, Igor the father, and Alcibiades (young) the child standing in front of you.
localizations.answer_hint_28: With the pocket knife (26), you engrave a heart on the tree (19).
localizations.answer_hint_29: Light this wood (card 29) with the matches (35).
localizations.answer_hint_33: 4 for the seasons / 0 for oblivion / 7 for the sins (depicted on card 79) / 8 for the tilted infinity (depicted on the blackboard) / 1 for solitude. Enter combination 40781.
localizations.answer_hint_37: Erase the fireplace from the plan (37) with the eraser (30). Thus, the fireplace will not be built.
localizations.answer_hint_45: Engrave on this trunk the initials of the lovers: S(ophie) and I(gor). The final engraved drawing on the cards S and I shows the 5+1=6 operation.
localizations.answer_hint_54: Dig the lawn (54) with the shovel (14).
localizations.answer_hint_55: The hourglass #1 has the fastest flow rate, followed by #9, then by #5, then by #0. You can enter the year 1950 in the time travel machine.
localizations.answer_hint_69: The only 8-note melody is the second one. The metronome points to every other beat (1st, 3rd, and 7th notes), i.e.; 1, 9, 7, and 4. You can now enter the year 1974 in the time travel machine.
localizations.answer_hint_75: Calculate the difference between 1900 and the year in which you play this scenario. Add these years to the current year and you will find the year in the future that needs to be entered in the machine.
localizations.answer_hint_82: Catch the butterfly (13) with the net (82).
localizations.answer_hint_99: The colors of the butterflies in the living room are the key: purple (saved butterfly), green (drawn on the wall: 67), blue (with the cat: 99), dark green or white (blackboard: 75).
localizations.machine_33: You hear an encouraging clinking, it is indeed the code that opens the safe.
localizations.machine_71: The machine starts smoking. You are back to the current time, but it impossible to travel any further.
localizations.event_1900: You feel you are in a maelstrom. You are thrown into the past.
localizations.event_1950: The hourglasses indicate a new time: 1950, here we come!
localizations.event_1974: By following the score's direction, you go to 1974.
localizations.event_2138: Well done. The future is waiting for you!
localizations.machine_23_question_5: How come you know my name? Do you know my grandfather?
localizations.machine_23_end_title: I just finished my solar energy flashlight, but now I'm a little bored…
localizations.machine_33_hint_1: The safe requires a 5-digit combination which corresponds to the number of books in the bookcase (by replacing the one you found).
localizations.machine_33_hint_2: Each book alludes to a number: Seasons = 4, Oblivion = 0, etc.
localizations.machine_33_hint_3: 4 for the seasons / 0 for oblivion / 7 for the sins (depicted on card 79) / 8 for the tilted infinity (depicted on the blackboard) / 1 for solitude. Enter combination 40781.
localizations.machine_55_hint_1: Once tipped over, note that the sands in these hourglasses do not pour at the same flow rate.
localizations.machine_55_hint_2: The sequence in which the numbers appear is important.
localizations.machine_55_hint_3: The hourglass #1 has the fastest flow rate, followed by #9, then by #5, then by #0. You can enter the year 1950 in the time travel machine.
localizations.machine_58_hint_1: Once you have found the number of required doses, you will have to transfer the liquid between barrels to reach this dosage.
localizations.machine_58_hint_2: For starters, proceed as follows: 8->3, then 3->5. Repeat the procedure. There will only be 1 dose left in barrel 3.
localizations.machine_58_hint_3: To finalize, 5->8, 3->5, 8->3 and there will be exactly 4 doses in barrel 8.
localizations.machine_69_hint_1: This melody matches only one of the 3 compositions on the score. Identify it by the number of notes.
localizations.machine_69_hint_2: The beats marked by the metronome indicate specific notes of the melody.
localizations.machine_69_hint_3: The only 8-note melody is the second one. The metronome points to every other beat (1st, 3rd, and 7th notes), i.e.; 1, 9, 7, and 4. You can now enter the year 1974 in the time travel machine.
localizations.machine_71_not_end_yet: Don’t be in such a hurry to return to your time!
localizations.machine_71_futur_error: You are left with one single trip. Do you really want to remain stuck in the past?
localizations.machine_71_hint_1: You must enter the correct years in the machine if you want to move forward in the adventure.
localizations.machine_71_hint_2: Alcibiades Tempus sent us a book from his era which was published in 1900. Join him in 1900 by dialing 1900 in this machine.
localizations.machine_23_end_subtitle: Obviously, someone needs an intellectual stimulant…
